logs.content: **Hello! 👋**, I'm **Agent Zero**, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?

logs.heading: A0: Loading gchat skill to sync Google Chat conversations

thoughts: Task: Load gchat skill to sync Google Chat conversations.
Skill auto-detects days to look back; requires Chrome DevTools at 192.168.1.11:9223 with Google Chat in 3-panel view.
Wait for completion (5-15 min), then notify via notify-user skill on success or failure.
First, load the gchat skill using skills_tool:load.
Then monitor progress and handle completion/failure accordingly.
kvps.headline: Loading gchat skill to sync Google Chat conversations
